name: Arcana Force VII - The Chariot
name_jp: アルカナフォース<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ⅶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セブン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＨＥ ＣＨＡＲＩＯＴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・チャリオット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon that monster to your field.
● Tails: Give control of this card to your opponent.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters

Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
